evals.prompt: 帮我做一个给客户演示的PPT，主题是用Azure OpenAI Service + Azure AI Search搭建一个企业级RAG方案。客户是一家金融公司，需要处理中文文档检索。大概10页左右，需要架构图。
evals.expected_output: Should produce a .pptx file with ~10 slides including architecture diagram. Route: azure-diagrams + pptx/skywork-ppt.

assertions.name: correct_routing
assertions.criteria: Selects pptx output format (html2pptx or skywork-ppt) and azure-diagrams for architecture diagram generation

assertions.name: narrative_structure
assertions.criteria: Follows problem → solution → architecture → implementation → next steps flow; includes agenda slide and clear section transitions

evals.prompt: 我下周要在团队内部做一个Azure Container Apps的技术分享，主要讲怎么从AKS迁移到ACA，包括对比、迁移步骤和注意事项。内容比较多，中文为主，帮我做成HTML slides。
evals.expected_output: Should produce HTML slides via frontend-slides. Route: frontend-slides for Chinese-heavy internal sharing.

evals.prompt: HR给了我一个公司模板 company-template.pptx，让我做一个关于我过去一个季度工作成果的分享，包括帮客户做了3个Azure landing zone部署、2个AI项目POC、还有一些社区分享。帮我填好这个模板。
evals.expected_output: Should analyze template then fill it. Route: skywork-ppt template workflow or pptx OOXML.

assertions.name: template_analyzed
assertions.criteria: Reads the template to extract layout structure, color palette, font families, and placeholder positions before filling content

assertions.name: template_style_preserved
assertions.criteria: Output uses the template's original fonts, colors, and master slide layouts — no new styles introduced

evals.prompt: 我要做一个Azure AI Services的hands-on workshop，大概3小时，目标是让参加者自己动手搭建一个简单的document intelligence + AI search的pipeline。需要包含step-by-step的操作截图和代码片段。做成HTML slides方便现场展示。
evals.expected_output: Should produce HTML slides with step-by-step instructions, code snippets, and screenshot placeholders. Route: frontend-slides for workshop format.

assertions.name: hands_on_exercises
assertions.criteria: Contains clearly marked 'try it yourself' sections with specific instructions participants can follow independently

assertions.name: time_pacing
assertions.criteria: Content is structured into logical sections that can fit a 3-hour workshop; includes breaks or transition points

evals.prompt: 帮我快速做3页slides，内容是Azure Well-Architected Framework的5个pillar概述，给明天内部standup用，不需要太花哨。
evals.expected_output: Should use lightweight path (< 5 slides). Minimal planning, no parallel agents. Quick turnaround with simple styling.

assertions.name: lightweight_execution
assertions.criteria: Uses simplified single-pass workflow without spawning parallel agents or generating separate diagram files; completes with minimal overhead
